name: White Chili
recipeIngredient: 19 ounce can cannellini beans, drained and divided
16 ounce can navy beans, drained and divided
16 ounce canned chicken breast halves without skin, cooked and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 1 cup broth, 1/2 cup cannellini beans, and 1/2 cup navy beans in container of an electric blender or food processor; cover and process until smooth.
2. Place bean mixture, remaining broth, remaining cannellini beans, remaining navy beans, chicken and remaining ingredients in Dutch oven. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer 30 minutes. Ladle chili into individual bowls.
